title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Treebo Hotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
